name: Multi-Framework Orchestration
description: A supervisor dispatches subtasks to two remote agents running on other frameworks via the A2A protocol, a Join collects their responses, and an aggregator LLM composes the final answer — orchestration without coupling implementations.

data.label: Cross-framework via A2A
data.text: Each A2A Agent calls an external agent (CrewAI, ADK, a custom service…) over the Agent-to-Agent protocol. The Supervisor dispatches in parallel, the Join collects responses, and the Aggregator reconciles them. No shared codebase required.

data.label: Dispatcher
data.description: Split the request and delegate each part to the right remote specialist.

data.label: Finance Specialist
data.taskDescription: Handle the financial-analysis portion of the request.

data.label: Legal Specialist
data.taskDescription: Handle the legal-review portion of the request.

data.label: Aggregator
data.systemPrompt: Reconcile the specialist responses into one coherent answer to the original request.
